text:
Shipped a pretty big update to Image Extender, my open-source AI studio for 2D game art.

Sprite Studio now supports 5 body types:
🧍 Humanoid
🐺 Quadruped
🐍 Serpent / Fish
🦅 Flyer / Bird
🟢 Blob
Each one has its own pose-guide rig, animation set, and starter creatures. I also https://t.co/xbO4MGJYvZ
